name: wd_review_high_purity
description: Under-resolved WD review pass: keep two or more surviving transits, allow modest MES, but require a compact shape statistic and a primary event at least 4 sigma stronger than secondary/tertiary/positive events.

name: wd_review_balanced
description: Slightly looser shape pass for 200 s WD transits whose trapezoid/planet fits are cadence-limited; still requires primary dominance.

name: wd_review_aggressive
description: Aggressive human-review catchment for exploratory triage; useful for estimating the purity cost of relaxing both the inherited stock LEO shape cut and the primary-dominance guard.
